description: Create a simple todo web application using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. The app should allow users to add, edit, and delete tasks. It should also have a feature to mark tasks as completed.
requirements: Use HTML to create the structure of the webapp.
Use CSS to style the webapp and make it visually appealing.
Use JavaScript to add interactivity to the webapp, such as adding, editing, deleting, and marking tasks as completed.
Ensure that the app is responsive and works well on different screen sizes.
